allow: Bash(node -e "const { SocketModeClient } = require\(''@slack/socket-mode''\); console.log\(typeof SocketModeClient\); const c = new SocketModeClient\({ appToken: ''xapp-test'' }\); console.log\(''events:'', c.eventNames ? c.eventNames\(\) : ''n/a''\); console.log\(''methods:'', Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(c\)\).filter\(m => !m.startsWith\(''_''\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
